data.name: Settings_Language_Hint
data.value: Changes apply immediately. Some text updates only after reopening a window.

data.name: Settings_ExcludedFolders
data.value: Excluded folder names (comma-separated, matched on any path segment, case-insensitive)

data.name: Settings_ExcludedPatterns
data.value: Excluded file name patterns (comma-separated globs, e.g. *_proxy.mp4, *.LRV)

data.name: Settings_DbRestart
data.value: Changing the database path requires an app restart.

data.name: Settings_Sidecar_Desc
data.value: When enabled, a small "<filename>.findthatshot.json" file is written next to each video on save, containing its tags, rating, status and notes. Other tools (DaVinci Resolve, Premiere, Lightroom, FCP, etc.) ignore these files. Source video files are never modified. Failures on read-only / offline drives are skipped silently.

data.name: Settings_Sidecar_Check
data.value: Write sidecar JSON files next to videos

data.name: Settings_Backup_Desc
data.value: The app can back up the catalog database (your tags, ratings, notes, status) to a folder you choose. Source video files are never touched.

data.name: Settings_Backup_Auto
data.value: Back up automatically on app startup

data.name: Settings_Backup_Restore_Tip
data.value: Stage a restore from the selected backup. The app will restart to safely swap the database file.

data.name: Settings_FfmpegPath
data.value: ffmpeg.exe path (leave blank to use PATH)

data.name: Settings_FfprobePath
data.value: ffprobe.exe path (leave blank to use PATH)

data.name: Settings_Proxy_Desc
data.value: When enabled, the in-app player prefers a DaVinci Resolve-style proxy when one exists. For each clip we look for a sibling "Proxy" folder containing a file with the same base name (any extension) and play that instead — much faster on high-bitrate 4K 60p sources. Falls back to the original clip silently when no proxy is found. The catalog, thumbnails, metadata and the "Play externally" command always continue to point at the original file.

data.name: Settings_Proxy_Check
data.value: Prefer DaVinci Resolve proxies for in-app playback

data.name: Settings_Telemetry_Desc
data.value: When enabled, the in-app player shows a telemetry strip under the video for DJI clips that have a sibling ".SRT" file — ISO, shutter, aperture, focal length, altitude and GPS, synced to the current frame. Display-only and read live from the file; the player also has its own inline toggle.

data.name: Settings_Telemetry_Check
data.value: Show drone telemetry overlay in the player

data.name: Settings_FlightPath_Desc
data.value: When enabled, the sidebar map draws the full drone flight path for clips that have a sibling DJI ".SRT" file, as a line with start / end markers. This is display-only: turning it off just hides the route — clips are still geotagged with their location and the single pin still shows. The flight path is read live from the file and never stored.

data.name: Settings_FlightPath_Check
data.value: Show drone flight paths on the map

data.name: Settings_HoverScrub_Desc
data.value: When enabled, hovering a catalog card and sweeping the pointer left-to-right scrubs through preview frames sampled across the clip — fast visual triage without opening the player. Frames are generated on demand the first time you hover a clip (a brief pause while ffmpeg extracts them), then cached; clips you never hover cost nothing. The source files are only ever read.

data.name: Settings_HoverScrub_Check
data.value: Enable hover-scrub previews on catalog cards

data.name: Settings_Review_Desc
data.value: Pin up to ten tags to the number keys. While the in-app player is open (review mode), pressing a digit toggles that tag on or off for the current clip — no mouse needed. Digits still type normally while you're editing the tag name, notes or coordinates fields.

data.name: Settings_Review_Fill_Tip
data.value: Drop your most-used tags into the empty slots.

data.name: Settings_Ai_Desc
data.value: Optional. Runs a local CLIP model over frames sampled across each clip to propose tags (sea, fog, ships, snow…) you accept or reject, and to enable natural-language search (e.g. "drone shot over snowy mountains at sunset"). All processing is local and offline; the model only ever reads frames — source files are never modified. Off by default; turning it on enables a one-time model download (~150 MB).

data.name: Settings_Ai_Check
data.value: Enable AI auto-tagging and natural-language search

data.name: Settings_Ai_ClearData_Tip
data.value: Remove all embeddings and pending suggestions. Accepted tags and source files are kept.

data.name: Settings_Ai_ModelFolder
data.value: Model folder (optional — leave blank to use the managed download location)

data.name: Settings_Ai_SecondsPerFrame
data.value: Sample one frame every N seconds (frame count scales with clip length, then clamps to the min/max below)

data.name: Settings_Ai_Threshold
data.value: Suggestion confidence threshold (0.20–0.40; higher = fewer, cleaner suggestions)

data.name: Settings_Ai_Adaptive
data.value: Adapt thresholds to my accept/reject history (per-label)

data.name: Settings_Ai_Adaptive_Desc
data.value: Once a label has a few accepted/rejected suggestions, its confidence cutoff is learned from your decisions instead of the global value above — labels you keep rejecting are suppressed, labels you accept appear sooner. The CLIP model itself is never modified.

data.name: Settings_Ai_Footer
data.value: After enabling and downloading, run Catalog → Generate AI tags…, then review proposals in Catalog → Review AI suggestions….

data.name: Settings_Backup_SavedPruned
data.value: Backup saved to {0} ({1}). Pruned {2} old backup(s).

data.name: Settings_Restore_Confirm
Settings_Restore_FailedBody
Settings_Restore_SafetyCopyLine
data.value: Safety copy of the previous catalog: {0}

data.name: Settings_Restore_RestartQuestion
data.value: The app needs to restart to complete the restore. Restart now?

data.name: Settings_Restore_DeferredBody
data.value: The restore will be applied automatically the next time you start the app.

data.name: Settings_AiStatus_Disabled
data.value: Disabled. Turn on to enable AI tagging and natural-language search.

data.name: Settings_AiStatus_NotInstalled
data.value: Model not installed. Download it, or point at a folder containing the CLIP ONNX bundle.

data.name: Settings_AiStatus_DownloadFailed
data.value: Download failed. Check the model URL / your connection, or supply the bundle manually.

data.name: Settings_ClearAi_Confirm
data.value:
Remove all AI-generated data (embeddings and pending tag suggestions) from the catalog?
Tags you've already accepted stay. Source files are never touched. You can regenerate later.

data.name: About_Tagline
data.value: A local-first catalog for browsing, tagging, and searching your video archive.

data.name: About_License_Intro
data.value: This application is distributed under the

data.name: About_NoticesPathFallback
data.value: Full third-party license texts ship in THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md next to the application.

data.name: Main_Menu_RemoveSelectedFolder_Tip
data.value: Remove the selected root folder and any catalog entries imported from it. Source video files will NOT be touched.

data.name: Main_Menu_Stats_Tip
data.value: See aggregate metrics for the whole catalog — counts, total size and runtime, and status / rating / camera / codec / resolution / tag / year breakdowns. Read-only.

data.name: Main_Menu_Duplicates_Tip
data.value: Find clips that share the same file size, duration, and resolution — almost certainly the same footage in more than one place — and prune the redundant catalog entries. Source video files are never moved or deleted.

data.name: Main_Menu_Moments_Tip
data.value: Search across every timestamped moment (sub-clip) you've marked — by label, note, tag, or rating — and jump straight to the shot in the player.

data.name: Main_Menu_Map_Tip
data.value: See every geotagged clip clustered on a map. Click a cluster to scope the grid to it, click a marker to preview a clip, or filter the grid to whatever's in view. Read-only.

data.name: Main_Menu_Calendar_Tip
data.value: See a year-by-month heatmap of when you shot. Click a month to list its clips, preview one, and jump to it in the grid or player, or scope the grid to that month. Read-only.

data.name: Main_Menu_GenerateAi_Tip
data.value: Score clips that don't have AI embeddings yet with a local CLIP model (sampling frames across each clip) to propose tags. Nothing is auto-applied; review proposals afterwards. Source files are only read.

data.name: Main_Menu_RescoreAi_Tip
data.value: Re-run AI scoring on EVERY clip (not just new ones) — use after changing the sampling settings, label vocabulary, or model. Accepted/rejected tags are kept; pending suggestions are refreshed.

data.name: Main_Menu_ReviewAi_Tip
data.value: Accept or reject the AI's proposed tags. Accepting adds a real tag to the clip.

data.name: Main_Menu_FillLocations_Tip
data.value: For any video that has GPS coordinates but no location, look up a place name from OpenStreetMap and fill it in. Existing locations are not changed.

data.name: Main_Menu_RemoveOffline_Tip
data.value: Remove catalog entries whose source file is no longer on disk. Source video files will NOT be touched.

data.name: Main_Menu_ShowUnreviewed_Tip
data.value: Limit the catalog to clips whose status is still Unreviewed OR that have no tags yet.

data.name: Main_Menu_MainSubject_Tip
data.value: When filtering by tags, only match clips where the tag is a primary subject — hide clips where it's just an incidental/background element.

data.name: Main_Menu_SemanticSearch_Tip
data.value: Treat the search box as a natural-language description (e.g. "drone shot over snowy mountains at sunset") and rank clips by AI visual similarity instead of literal text matching.

data.name: Main_Menu_StartReview_Tip
data.value: Clear all filters, show only unreviewed clips, and select the first one.

data.name: Main_Menu_CheckUpdates_Tip
data.value: Look for a newer version on GitHub Releases and install it. Only works when running from an installed build (Setup.exe).

data.name: Main_Menu_Diagnostics_Tip
data.value: View environment info and the recent application log for troubleshooting.

data.name: Main_Menu_ReportBug_Tip
data.value: Open the GitHub issue tracker in your browser. Tip: use Diagnostics → Copy full report and paste it into the issue.

data.name: Main_Menu_Feedback_Tip
data.value: Open a new email to the developer. Tip: use Diagnostics → Copy full report and paste it into the message.

data.name: Main_Search_Placeholder
data.value: Search filename, folder, tags, notes, camera...

data.name: Main_Search_Placeholder_Ai
data.value: Describe a shot, e.g. "cruise ship at sunset" — press Enter

data.name: Main_Search_AiToggle_Tip
data.value: Search by description (AI): type a natural-language description (e.g. "cruise ship at sunset") and rank clips by AI visual similarity instead of literal keyword matching.

data.name: Main_Saved_Save_Tip
data.value: Save the current filters as a reusable search

data.name: Main_Saved_Empty
data.value: No saved searches yet. Set up filters above, then click Save.

data.name: Main_Folders_Add_Tip
data.value: Add a root folder to catalogue (Ctrl+O)

data.name: Main_Folders_Empty_Subtext
data.value: Add a folder to start cataloguing your video archive.

data.name: Main_Folders_Ctx_Remove_Tip
data.value: Remove this root folder and any catalog entries imported from it. Source video files will NOT be touched.

data.name: Main_Tags_List_Tip
data.value: Click a tag to add it as a filter. Multiple tags are combined with AND (videos must have every selected tag).

data.name: Main_ClearFilters_Tip
data.value: Reset search box, all filters, and date range (Ctrl+Shift+L)

data.name: Main_NoClips_Subtext
data.value: Try adjusting filters, clearing your search, or scanning a folder to bring videos into the catalog.

data.name: Main_Ctx_ShowInfo_Tip
data.value: Open the full clip-info popup (file system, video, camera, location, catalog, internal).

data.name: Main_Ctx_PlayExternal_Tip
data.value: Open the source video in the OS default media player (shell-associated for the file extension).

data.name: Main_Ctx_OpenLocation_Tip
data.value: Reveal the source video file in Windows Explorer.

data.name: Main_Player_Close_Tip
data.value: Close player and return to the catalog (Esc)

data.name: Main_Player_Original_Tip
data.value: Playing the original, full-resolution source file

data.name: Main_Player_MarkIn_Tip
data.value: Set the in-point of a moment here (I)

data.name: Main_Player_MarkOut_Tip
data.value: Set the out-point and save the moment (O)

data.name: Main_NoClipSelected_Subtext
data.value: Pick a clip from the catalog to view its metadata, tag it, set a status or rating, and add notes.

data.name: Main_Editor_Loc_Set_Tip
data.value: Assign GPS coordinates to this clip by clicking the map or typing them in.

data.name: Main_Editor_Loc_Edit_Tip
data.value: Click the map or type a new coordinate pair to replace the saved GPS.

data.name: Main_Editor_Loc_Clear_Tip
data.value: Remove the GPS coordinates on this clip (the LocationText label is left alone).

data.name: Main_Editor_Loc_Copy_Tip
data.value: Copy 'lat, lon' to the clipboard in invariant-culture format.

data.name: Main_Editor_Loc_Pick_Tip
data.value: Click on the map, or type/paste 'lat, lon' (e.g. 60.482, 6.902).

data.name: Main_Editor_Loc_Save_Tip
data.value: Save the GPS coordinates to the catalog, reverse-geocode for Location Text, and write the sidecar.

data.name: Main_Editor_Tag_Prominence_Tip
data.value: Right-click to mark this tag as a background (incidental) subject.

data.name: Main_Editor_Tag_Remove_Tip
data.value: Remove this tag from the clip.

data.name: Main_Editor_Moments_Hint
data.value: Play the clip, then press I to set an in-point and O to set the out-point — each moment becomes a searchable shot with its own thumbnail, label, rating, note and tags.

data.name: Main_Status_AiTagging_Tip
data.value: A local AI scoring pass is running. You can keep working; click to open the review window and triage clips already scored.

data.name: Main_Status_AiDone_Tip
data.value: The AI scoring pass finished. Click to open the review window and accept/reject the proposed tags.

data.name: Main_Status_Update_Tip
data.value: A new version is available on GitHub. Click to view details and install (the app will close and restart on the new version when ready).

data.name: Main_Status_Sidecar_Tip
data.value: Shows whether sidecar JSON files are being written next to videos. Toggle in Settings → Sidecar files.

data.name: Main_Status_MapScope_Tip
data.value: The catalog grid is scoped to clips picked on the map. Click to clear and show all matches again.

data.name: Main_Status_FfmpegMissing
data.value: FFmpeg/FFprobe not found. Configure paths in Settings.

data.name: Main_Status_AiOff
data.value: AI tagging is off or the model isn't installed — enable it in Settings → AI tagging.

data.name: Main_Status_AiNoClips
data.value: No clips in the catalog to score.

data.name: Main_Status_AiNoNew
data.value: All clips already have AI embeddings. Nothing to score.

data.name: Main_Status_AiRescoring
data.value: Re-scoring all {0} clip(s) with the AI model

data.name: Main_Status_AiScoring
data.value: Scoring {0} new clip(s) with the AI model ({1} total)

data.name: Main_Status_NoFolders
data.value: No folders to add — drop one or more folders.

data.name: Main_Status_NoRootsToScan
data.value: Add at least one root folder before scanning

data.name: Main_Status_ReviewCaughtUp
data.value: Review session: nothing to review — you're caught up.

data.name: Main_Dlg_PickRoot
data.value: Select a root folder to scan

data.name: Main_RemoveRoot_ConfirmWithVideos
data.value:
Remove the root folder "{0}" and {1} video record(s) imported from it?
This affects the catalog database and the app's thumbnail cache only. The source video files on disk will NOT be touched.

data.name: Main_RemoveRoot_ConfirmEmpty
data.value:
Remove the root folder "{0}"?
No video records were imported from this folder. The folder on disk will NOT be touched.

data.name: Main_RemoveRoot_DoneWithVideos
data.value: Removed root folder and {0} video record(s) from the catalog. Source video files untouched.

data.name: Main_RemoveRoot_Done
data.value: Removed root folder. Source video files untouched.

data.name: Main_RemoveVideos_None
data.value: Select one or more videos to remove

data.name: Main_RemoveVideos_ConfirmHeader
data.value: Remove {0} video record(s) from the database?

data.name: Main_RemoveVideos_ConfirmFooter
data.value: This removes the catalog entries (tags, ratings, notes, etc.) and their cached thumbnails. The source video files on disk will NOT be touched.

data.name: Main_RemoveVideos_Done
data.value: Removed {0} video record(s) from the catalog. Source video files untouched.

data.name: Main_RemoveOffline_None
data.value: There are no offline video records to remove.

data.name: Main_RemoveOffline_Confirm
data.value:
Remove all {0} offline video record(s) from the database?
These are records whose source file is no longer found on disk (based on the latest Refresh / scan).
This cleans up the catalog and the app's thumbnail cache. No source video files will be touched.

data.name: Main_RemoveOffline_Done
data.value: Removed {0} offline video record(s) from the catalog. Source video files untouched.

data.name: Main_Scan_FfprobeMissing
data.value: ffprobe.exe was not found. Open Settings to configure the FFmpeg paths.

data.name: Main_Update_NotInstalledBody
Main_Update_SkippedStatus
data.value: Update check skipped (not an installed build)

data.name: Main_Update_ConfirmBody
Main_Update_PreparingStatus
data.value: Preparing update v{0}… this can take a moment.

data.name: Main_Update_FailedBody
Main_DeleteSearch_Confirm
data.value:
Delete the saved search "{0}"?
This only removes the saved filter. No videos, tags, or catalog records are affected.

data.name: Detail_Sidecar_NotFound
data.value: sidecar skipped (video not found in catalog)

data.name: Detail_Moment_InPoint
data.value: In point {0} — press O to set the out point

data.name: Detail_Moment_TagMain
data.value: Moment tag marked as main subject · {0}

data.name: Dup_Desc
data.value: Clips that share the same file size, duration, and resolution — almost certainly the same footage in more than one place. Read-only: your source video files are never moved or deleted.

data.name: Dup_MarkTip
data.value: Mark this copy to be removed from the catalog (the file on disk is never touched).

data.name: Dup_SelectRedundant_Tip
data.value: Mark every copy except the suggested keep in each set.

data.name: Dup_EmptyDesc
data.value: No two clips in the catalog share the same file size, duration, and resolution. Rescan after importing more footage to check again.

data.name: Dup_SelectionText
data.value: {0} selected · {1} of disk no longer cataloged

data.name: Dup_Summary
data.value: {0} duplicate set(s) · {1} redundant copy(ies) · {2} reclaimable on disk

data.name: Dup_Warning
data.value: WARNING: {0} duplicate set(s) have EVERY copy selected — removing them leaves no catalog entry for that clip at all.

data.name: Dup_Confirm_Header
data.value: Remove {0} duplicate catalog entr(y/ies) from the database?

data.name: Dup_Confirm_Footer
data.value: This removes the catalog rows (tags, ratings, notes) and their cached thumbnails only. The source video files on disk will NOT be touched, moved, or deleted.

data.name: MomentSearch_Subtitle
data.value: Search every shot you've marked — by label, note, tag, file name, or rating — and jump straight to it.

data.name: MomentSearch_OnlineOnlyToolTip
data.value: Hide moments whose source file is currently offline.

data.name: SaveSearch_Desc
data.value: Give the current filters a name. It re-runs live against the catalog whenever you click it.

data.name: BulkEdit_Desc
data.value: Apply changes to every clip in the current selection.

data.name: AiReview_OfflinePreview
data.value: Source file is offline — preview unavailable

data.name: AiReview_Accept_Tip
data.value: Accept — add this tag to the clip

data.name: AiReview_Play_Tip
data.value: Play this moment in the player

data.name: AiReview_Empty_Subtext
data.value: Run Catalog → Generate AI tags… to score your clips, then come back here to accept or reject the proposals.

data.name: AiReview_PreviewTooltip
data.value: Click to jump to this moment in the player; hover to preview the best frame

data.name: AiReview_OfflineTooltip
data.value: Source file is offline — preview unavailable

data.name: MapBrowse_Description
data.value: Every geotagged clip in your archive, clustered by location. Click a cluster to scope the catalog grid to it, click a marker to preview a clip, or filter the grid to whatever's in view.

data.name: MapBrowse_WholeArchive_Tip
data.value: On: plot every geotagged clip in the catalog. Off: plot only the clips matching the current grid filters.

data.name: MapBrowse_FilterGrid_Tip
data.value: Scope the catalog grid to every clip currently inside the map viewport.

data.name: MapBrowse_ClickMarker
data.value: Click a marker to preview the clip here.

data.name: MapBrowse_NoGeoWhole
data.value: No geotagged clips in the catalog.

data.name: MapBrowse_NoGeoFiltered
data.value: No geotagged clips match the current filters.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_Description
data.value: A year-by-month heatmap of when you shot. Brighter cells hold more clips; click a month to list its clips, preview one, and jump to it in the grid or player.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_WholeArchive_Tip
data.value: On: count every clip in the catalog. Off: count only the clips matching the current grid filters.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_FilterMonth_Tip
data.value: Scope the catalog grid to the selected month's date range.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_EmptyHeatmap
data.value: No dated clips to chart yet. Scan some footage first.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_ClickMonth
data.value: Click a month in the heatmap to list its clips here.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_NoDatedWhole
data.value: No dated clips in the catalog.

data.name: CalendarBrowse_NoDatedFiltered
data.value: No dated clips match the current filters.

data.name: CatalogStats_Description
data.value: A live snapshot of your catalog. Read-only — your source video files are never touched.

data.name: CatalogStats_Empty_Subtext
data.value: Add a root folder and run a scan, then reopen this window to see your catalog at a glance.

data.name: Diagnostics_LevelFilter_Tip
data.value: Show only entries at this level or more severe.

data.name: Diagnostics_CopyLog_Tip
data.value: Copy the currently shown log lines to the clipboard.

data.name: Diagnostics_Clear_Tip
data.value: Clear the on-screen buffer (the on-disk log file is kept).

data.name: Diagnostics_CopyReport_Tip
data.value: Copy the environment summary and the visible log to the clipboard.

data.name: Diagnostics_NoLogFile
data.value: No log file is available for this session.

data.name: Main_ReprocessAi_Body
data.value:
Re-score every clip with the AI model?
This re-runs frame sampling and CLIP inference on all clips (not just new ones), so it can take a while on a large catalog. Existing accepted/rejected tags are kept; pending suggestions are refreshed.

data.name: About_NoticesNotFound_Body
data.value: THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md could not be found next to the application. You can read it online at https://github.com/liknes/FindThatShot/blob/main/THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md.

data.name: About_OpenNoticesFailed
data.value: Could not open the notices file: {0}
